channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
item.description: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial asks: What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace?

item.title: 'Agentic coding tools have access to everything they need for this': Security experts warn Claude Code can be exploited simply by trying to be helpful
item.description: A hidden DNS record tricked Claude Code into opening a reverse shell during routine error recovery, bypassing every standard security scanning tool completely.

item.title: Unihertz Titan 2 Elite review: This 5G business phone with a BlackBerry-style keyboard made my mobile work feel faster
item.description: A pocketable 5G Android phone with real QWERTY keyboard, AMOLED, and serious shortcut power.

item.title: A 10-year sky survey begins filming a 'cosmic movie,' cyborg cockroaches go for a dive and more science stories
NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
item.description: The Swift Observatory was launched in 2004, but recent solar storms have pushed its orbit lower, and it's in danger of burning up in Earth's atmosphere as soon as this year. To try and stave off its demise, NASA has enlisted Katalyst Space Technologies. The company's Link spacecraft launched Friday with the goal of intercepting […]
